div.p: Read consumer's claim position from cache line 0
Get sequence number for slot at position % capacity
Compare to expected value seq should equal pos+1 for data
Data is available when sequence == position + 1
cpp if (head.compare_exchange_weak( pos, pos + 1)) break; // claimed!
Atomically claim slot Retry on CAS failure
Slot expects earlier position → no data available
cpp slot_idx = pos & mask memcpy(out, slots[slot_idx], min(out_size, slot_size))
Copy message from slot to output buffer
Signal slot recycled Ready for next cycle (wraps with +capacity)
